meta.title: About Ecomm Wizards | Leading Shopify Plus Agency
meta.description: Ecom Wizards is a leading Shopify Plus agency with 8+ years of experience and $900M+ in client revenue. Meet the team behind 700+ successful Shopify stores.
meta.h1: About Ecom Wizards A Leading Shopify Plus Agency

h2s: The Shopify Agency Behind $900M+ in Client Revenue. From startup founders launching their first Shopify store to enterprise brands upgrading to Shopify Plus, we’ve helped over 700+ ecommerce businesses scale profitably.
At Ecomm Wizards , we don't just build Shopify stores - we build revenue machines.
Why Work with Ecomm Wizards
The Culture Behind Our High-Performance Shopify Agency

We believe excellent compounds. Our team continuously trains on the latest Shopify Plus features, ecommerce trends, AI tools, and conversion psychology frameworks. We foster a culture of ownership, every Shopify project is treated like it’s our own brand. No shortcuts. No templates. No recycled strategies.

Request POS Demo Marketing X Get Started Book a Call About Ecom Wizards A Leading Shopify Plus Agency We’re a global Shopify Plus agency helping ambitious ecommerce brands design, develop, and scale high-performance Shopify and Shopify Plus stores. Book a Free Consultation The Shopify Agency Behind $900M+ in Client Revenue. From startup founders launching their first Shopify store to enterprise brands upgrading to Shopify Plus, we’ve helped over 700+ ecommerce businesses scale profitably. At Ecomm Wizards , we don't just build Shopify stores - we build revenue machines. Headquartered in Toronto with teams across America, Europe, and Asia we combine design obsession with technical precision to help DTC brands outperform their competition. 100% Satisfaction Guarantee If you're not happy, we're not done. We don't hide behind contracts or excuses. Every project gets our full attention until it exceeds your expectations - period.

Result-oriented Approach Pretty stores are easy. Stores that convert? That's the hard part. We obsess over the details that actually move the needle - speed, UX, and conversion KPIs- so your revenue doesn't just grow, it compounds.

A Hub for Innovative Minds We attract people who hate mediocrity. Designers who push pixels until they're perfect. Developers who write clean code. Strategists who think three steps ahead. That Alpha energy shows up in every project we ship.

Get Started Why Work with Ecomm Wizards Transparent Communication Zero Cutting Corners World-Class Support Revenue-Driven Approach Proven Track Record Growth Obsessed Team 100% Client Satisfaction Transparent Communication Zero Cutting Corners World-Class Support Revenue-Driven Approach Proven Track Record Growth Obsessed Team 100% Client Satisfaction The Culture Behind Our High-Performance Shopify Agency We believe excellent compounds. Our team continuously trains on the latest Shopify Plus features, ecommerce trends, AI tools, and conversion psychology frameworks. We foster a culture of ownership, every Shopify project is treated like it’s our own brand. No shortcuts. No templates. No recycled strategies. A Note From Our Founder I’ll be honest with you.
When we started Ecom Wizards, we made a decision to specialize exclusively in Shopify and Shopify Plus development.
We saw too many ecommerce brands struggling with generic agencies that treated Shopify like “just another CMS.” But Shopify is an ecosystem, and mastering it requires deep platform expertise.
So here’s my commitment: if you partner with our Shopify experts, you won’t just keep up – you’ll lead. We’ll make sure of it.
The future belongs to brands that move now. Let’s make sure you’re one of them.

Book a Call Trusted by the Worlds Most Innovative Brands Our Journey as a Shopify Agency 2017 Where It All Began Started with a laptop, a vision, and zero clients. A small crew of Shopify-obsessed builders hungry to prove themselves. First store shipped. First win earned.
Hit $1M in revenue generated for merchants. Referrals started rolling in. Team grew to 10. The grind was real - and it was working.
Officially became a Shopify Partner. Crossed 50+ stores built. Expanded into full-service - design, dev, and strategy under one roof.
COVID hit. Ecommerce exploded. We helped brands pivot overnight and scale fast. $50M+ in client revenue. Team doubled to 25+.
Earned Shopify Plus Partner status. Crossed 200+ stores. Hit $150M in merchant revenue. Started working with 7 and 8-figure DTC brands.
Became Klaviyo Partner and Meta Business Partner. 350+ stores shipped. $300M+ revenue generated. Team scaled to 50+.
Integrated ChatGPT, Cursor AI, and automation into our workflows. Faster builds. Smarter strategies. 500+ stores crossed. $550M+ in client revenue.
Expanded across North America and Europe. 80+ team members. 650+ stores shipped. $750M+ revenue milestone unlocked.
700+ stores built. $900M+ in revenue generated for merchants. Full-stack Shopify Plus agency - and we're just getting started.
$1B+ in client revenue - that's the target. New markets. New partnerships. Same obsession with results. This is the year we cement our legacy.
Best Web Developers in New York 2022
We specialize in Shopify and Shopify Plus development, migrations, and enterprise ecommerce solutions.
We are a Shopify-first agency. This specialization allows us to deliver deeper expertise and better results.
Absolutely. We handle complete migrations from WooCommerce, Magento, BigCommerce, and custom platforms.
We operate globally, serving ecommerce brands across the US, UK, Australia, and beyond.
